description: AlertmanagerLimitsSpec defines the limits command line flags when starting Alertmanager.

maxPerSilenceBytes.description: maxPerSilenceBytes defines the maximum size of an individual silence as stored on disk. This corresponds to the Alertmanager's `--silences.max-per-silence-bytes` flag. It requires Alertmanager >= v0.28.0.

maxSilences.description: maxSilences defines the maximum number active and pending silences. This corresponds to the Alertmanager's `--silences.max-silences` flag. It requires Alertmanager >= v0.28.0.
